notes: Mode: manual-scp. Build is the Maven multi-module reactor under KobiCraftServer/. Artefacts are the per-plugin target/*.jar (excludes -sources / -javadoc per the deploy-local.sh pattern). Remote path is the Paper plugins/ dir for the main instance. Post-deploy is the templated systemd unit kobiicraft@main.service. Healthcheck is a TCP poke on the MC port 25565 -- if the JVM is restarting, this returns RST until Paper finishes loading (typically <120s). Owner must verify ~/.ssh/kobicraft_gex44 exists before invoking /deploy; otherwise verdict=ceiling.
